contributions.title: labeled issue: Exclude bots and maintainers from NSoC leaderboard workflow
contributions.description:
## Summary

The automated NSoC leaderboard workflow currently includes:

- `github-actions[bot]`
- repository maintainers/admins (e.g. `@S3DFX-CYBER`)
